title: UIView
description: CUP universal UI contract. Any backend language produces this JSON; the CUP TypeScript runtime renders it.

template.description: Django-style template string. Supports {{ var }}, {% if %}, {% for %}, {% elif %}, {% else %}.

state.description: Flat or nested data model. All values must be JSON-serialisable.

actions.description: Named actions bound to data-action attributes in the template. Values are ActionDescriptors.

ActionDescriptor.description: Describes what happens when a data-action is triggered.

FetchAction.description: POST/GET to a server endpoint. The response must be a UIView; the runtime remounts with it.

payload.description: Extra key/value pairs merged into the request body alongside the current state snapshot.

EmitAction.description: Dispatches a CustomEvent on the container element. Useful for parent-level listeners.

NavigateAction.description: Client-side navigation via the History API.

lang.description: Backend language that produced this view, e.g. 'python', 'go', 'rust'.

route.description: The server route that produced this view.
